name: Meeting Notes
prompt_body:
Listen to the recording of a meeting or conversation and produce structured meeting notes.

Output format:

## Summary
<2-3 sentence overview>

## Key Points
- bullet list of the main points discussed

## Decisions
- bullet list of decisions made (if any)

## Action Items
- [ ] action — owner (if mentioned)

## Open Questions
- bullet list of unresolved items

Ignore filler words and small talk. Be concise. If a section has nothing, omit it.
